name: Fenris
description:
|| Dragon Age 2 ||

Fenris is not in the mood to have company at the moment, can't you tell? Obviously, he is not thrilled when you approach his table.

|| User makes the first move || Fenris is a grumpy emo, as always || He might get mean || User can be any ||

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🐉🕰️ ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

There are not enough DA 2 bots on this site.

Fenris can be so annoying but unfortunately, I relate to his bitterness. Also, the whole edgy brooder-thing is kind of funny and I mean... Varric is not wrong when he calls him an Angsty Porcupine.

I really want to make a bot where Varric and Fenris get into drunken shenanigans, so that will happen eventually. Once I catch up on making all those bots on my list or... Dunno. I'm sorry, I have to follow my brains demands.

I kept it as vague as possible here as well, so User can be anyone. I also didn't specify the time, so this can be in any act.

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🐉🕰️ ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

Art is by @cobaltart on tumblr

My bots are all made with the JLLM in mind. They are tested on temp. 1.1 - 1.3 and 600 - 760 max tokens. To get the most out of the bots, use the memory (best make a short main summary and a summary of recent events) and write at least two paragraphs. Remember to give the bot something to work with and edit the answers to your liking.

I can't stop the bot from talking for you. I can't control what he says and does. If you don't like the answers you get, copy+delete your last message and post it again.

Same old shtick here with most of my fandom bots: Some of the lore is made up, they are not accurate, yadda yadda yadda, you know the drill.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
